summary: Tested 4 fixes: ServiceBox Admin '+ Add Service' button, inline toggle, ProductCard service modal routing, and backend service filtering. All tests passed. 16/16 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceBox '+Add Service' button opens ProductBoxEditor with title 'Create New Service', Product Type pre-set to 'Service', all 6 tabs (Basics, Suitability, Pillars, Commerce, Media, Mira AI) visible.
handleToggleActive: svcId fix (svc.id || svc._id) confirmed working — 'Premium Grooming Session' toggled Active → '✗ Off' → Active correctly, toast notification shown.

ProductCard service modal: For pillar=care + product_type=service, ConciergeOnlyProductDetailModal opens with dynamic badge 'Care Service · Concierge® Only'. No 'Add to Cart' button. 'Talk to Concierge®' button shown.

mira_score_engine.py line 587: products_master lookup filter {is_active: {$ne: False}, visibility.status: {$ne: archived}} confirmed present in code. Backend stats: active vs inactive services tracked correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test services (TEST-Service-*, TEST-AutoID-*, TEST-Toggle-*) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes in iteration 255 verified: (1) Ghost cache purge already done manually (364 entries deleted). (2) mira_score_engine.py line 587 now filters archived/inactive products_master entries. (3) ServiceBox.jsx handleToggleActive uses svc.id||svc._id correctly, '+ Add Service' button opens ProductBoxEditor in create mode with 'Create New Service' header. (4) ProductCard.jsx service modal routing: product_type='service' from any pillar (not just paperwork) correctly opens ConciergeOnlyProductDetailModal with dynamic badge '{Pillar} Service · Concierge® Only'. Two service product cards found in Care > Grooming: prod-SVC-CARE-GROOM-SPA (Full Spa Grooming) and prod-SVC-CARE-GROOM-HOME. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_service_box_255.py (16 tests all passing).

detailed_findings.servicebox_add_button: data-testid='add-service-btn' present, clicking opens ProductBoxEditor modal with title 'Create New Service', Product Type pre-set to Service
detailed_findings.servicebox_toggle: data-testid='toggle-service-svc-care-grooming' first row, click changes Active→Inactive→Active, toast shows '⏸ Premium Grooming Session set Inactive', no crash
detailed_findings.productcard_service_modal: Clicking 'Talk to Concierge® →' button on service cards opens ConciergeOnlyProductDetailModal (data-testid='paperwork-product-modal-*'), shows 'Care Service · Concierge® Only' badge for care pillar services, no 'Add to Cart' button
detailed_findings.backend_active_only: GET /api/service-box/services default (active_only=True) returns 0 inactive services, explicit active_only=false returns all including inactive
detailed_findings.backend_create_service: POST /api/service-box/services creates service with auto-generated SVC-{PILLAR}-{NAME} ID, name required (422 without it), persists to DB
